labels.I-ING: Continuation of the same ingredient span

model_analysis.ingredient_unit_meaning: Each contiguous ING span (after aggregation) is one 'ingredient unit' in the sense of one named chunk the model groups together. The model does **not** emit a distinct label for pack units (e.g. g, ml) or for list separators; percentages and units usually sit inside an ING span or in non-ING (O) gaps, depending on tokenization and training.
